sub_pixel_system.notes: Sports simulation game; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Football Movement System
special_mechanics.description: Sports simulation football game featuring player character control during American football gameplay. Movement parameters tied to football mechanics rather than platformer physics.

special_mechanics.name: Play-Call Mode
special_mechanics.description: Game mechanic introduced in Madden NFL '94 allowing player control during plays

special_mechanics.name: Pass-Catch Mode
special_mechanics.description: Gameplay mode affecting player control and movement responsiveness

special_mechanics.name: Screen Rotation System
special_mechanics.description: Field rotation during punts, kickoffs, and turnovers with pause; reduced player disorientation compared to instant POV reversal

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. This is a sports simulation game, not a platformer. Available documentation focuses on gameplay features, not physics parameters. Sources discuss overall game speed ('speed and easy gameplay' for Genesis version) but do not specify movement physics values like acceleration, gravity, or jump mechanics. Character movement is tied to football simulation mechanics rather than traditional platformer physics.
